MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ATTY. DEAN M. SCHMIDT'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF MONICA STAAR is
Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Sep-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF MONICA STAAR's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Continued to September 24, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 17, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).
Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
